Display Case (HOldeRofSecrEts)
This DC is dedicated to the admins, without whom it would not be possible. It's also dedicated to players who have contributed to it - without you it also would not be possible. Thanks to you all. :)

For those wondering, Jick rigged it so I can put quest items in my display case, and Skully and HotStuff gave me items otherwise impossible to get. Any item that can be earned or bought, I have earned or bought it.

Totals (2025/10/05)
11754 items collected

MISSING FROM THE DC:: Nothing!

Not displayed:
216 unimplemented items
59 unique items
17 non-existent items

TOTAL ITEM NUMBERS: 12,046
